items.title: Police station opens at Hitler's birthplace in bid to rid site of Nazi link
items.summary: The opening follows years of controversy about what to do with the 17th-Century former inn, where the Nazi dictator was born.

items.title: Teen Rescues Elderly Dementia Patient Wandering Around in 103°F Heat
items.summary: From Arizona comes the story of a young man helping an elderly woman whose dementia had left her disoriented, wandering about in 103°F heat. 14-year-old Royal Cothrun was riding his bike down empty si…
